zh.Gent, Oost-Vlaanderen, België: 比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Boudewijn van Gent於1090年出生在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特時，她的父親Boudewijn de Gent38歲，母親Oda d’Avesnes, Dame d’Avesnes, Leuze et Condé49歲。她與Rasso De Gavere結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1145年在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫加維享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Boudewijn van Gent于1090年出生在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特时，她的父亲Boudewijn de Gent38岁，母亲Oda d’Avesnes, Dame d’Avesnes, Leuze et Condé49岁。她与Rasso De Gavere结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1145年在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫加維享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Boudewijn van Gent was born in 1090, in Ghent, East Flanders, Belgium, her father, Boudewijn de Gent, was 38 and her mother, Oda d’Avesnes, Dame d’Avesnes, Leuze et Condé, was 49. She married Rasso De Gavere. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1145, in Gavere, East Flanders, Belgium, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Boudewijn van Gent est née en 1090, à Gand, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique, son père, Boudewijn de Gent, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Oda d’Avesnes, Dame d’Avesnes, Leuze et Condé, avait 49 ans. Elle a épousé Rasso De Gavere. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1145, à Gavere, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Boudewijn van Gent 1090 in Gent, Ostflandern, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Boudewijn de Gent 38 und ihre Mutter Oda d’Avesnes, Dame d’Avesnes, Leuze et Condé 49. Sie hat Rasso De Gavere geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1145 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Gavere, Ostflandern, Belgien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Boudewijn van Gent è nata il nel 1090 nel Gent, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio, sua padre, Boudewijn de Gent, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Oda d’Avesnes, Dame d’Avesnes, Leuze et Condé, aveva 49 anni. Lei sposato Rasso De Gavere. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1145, nel Gavere, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.Gavere, East Flanders, Belgium: ベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンガバー
ja.Gent, Oost-Vlaanderen, België: ベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンジェント
ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Boudewijn van Gentが1090年にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンジェントで生まれた時，父Boudewijn de Gentは38歳，母Oda d’Avesnes, Dame d’Avesnes, Leuze et Condéは49歳であった。Rasso De Gavereと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1145年にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンガバーで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Boudewijn van Gent(이)가 1090년 벨기에 스트-블라아더 젠트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Boudewijn de Gent(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Oda d’Avesnes, Dame d’Avesnes, Leuze et Condé(은)는 49세였다. 그녀는 Rasso De Gavere(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1145년 벨기에 스트-블라아더 게이버에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Boudewijn van Gent nasceu em 1090, em Gent, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica, seu pai, Boudewijn de Gent, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Oda d’Avesnes, Dame d’Avesnes, Leuze et Condé, tinha 49 anos. Ela casou-se com Rasso De Gavere. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1145, em Gavere, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Boudewijn van Gent родилась в 1090 г. в местности джент, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Boudewijn de Gent было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Oda d’Avesnes, Dame d’Avesnes, Leuze et Condé, 49. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Rasso De Gavere. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1145 г. в местности гавир, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Boudewijn van Gent nació en 1090, en Gent, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica, su papá, Boudewijn de Gent, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Oda d’Avesnes, Dame d’Avesnes, Leuze et Condé, tenía 49 años. Se casó con Rasso De Gavere. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1145, en Gavere, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica, a la edad de 55 años.
